overall_summary: The ElizaOS project has successfully matured its cloud infrastructure with the launch of Eliza Cloud Apps, featuring per-tenant isolation and metered billing. Significant codebase refactoring is underway, including the decomposition of the plugin-lifeops monolith into modular, specialized plugins.
key_facts: PR #8293 implemented the Eliza Cloud Apps data plane for per-tenant container isolation and automated provisioning.

The 7.5K-LOC plugin-lifeops monolith was refactored into plugin-personal-assistant and six specialized domain plugins including relationships, inbox, goals, blocker, finances, and remote-desktop in PR #8277.
PR #8294 was submitted by naked_monk to add the @usenami/plugin-signer, a keyless CEX/DEX signer using AWS Nitro Enclave, to the third-party registry.
A coding workbench supporting streaming and code diffs was launched to enhance agent intelligence and autonomy.
Metred billing and per-inference spend tracking were implemented in elizaos/eliza to support a cloud-hosted model.
Audit of the @elizaos/plugin-discord architecture by doniyorv7503 identified areas for optimization in real-time voice event management and text synchronization.
Steward login for Eliza Cloud was reported broken in production due to OAuth authorize/email 400 errors related to PKCE requirements.
Eliza Cloud Apps scaling audit identified P0 blockers including missing ingress installation and Postgres connection capacity limits.
open_questions: Who is still holding and haven't received supplies?
Can I help with the bots?
Are any additional changes needed from the contributor side after submitting PR #8294?

new_issues_prs.title: feat(cloud): Eliza Cloud Apps (Product 2) — per-tenant-isolated container hosting
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Foundational implementation for secure, isolated container hosting for AI agents.

new_issues_prs.title: refactor(lifeops): split plugin-lifeops into focused plugins + plugin-personal-assistant
new_issues_prs.author: lalalune
new_issues_prs.significance: Major architectural cleanup decomposing a monolithic plugin into modular components.

new_issues_prs.title: Eliza Cloud Apps: scaling + ingress gaps before go-live
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Identifies critical P0 blockers for scaling the cloud platform to high user counts.

overall_focus.claim: The project is shifting from a monolithic architecture toward a modular, plugin-based system to improve reliability and flexibility for enterprise cloud hosting.

discord_updates.summary: Primarily focused on community networking and job recruitment. A communication coordinator role for an international dev team was posted with profit-based pay.
Discussions centered on technical service offerings, specifically Senior AI Architecture services and auditing the Discord plugin's voice management capabilities.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: User naked_monk requested clarification on the review timeline and process for third-party plugin registry submissions.

strategic_insights.insight: The introduction of metered billing and container isolation signals a move toward a commercial SaaS model for AI agent hosting.
implications_or_questions: How will this impact the current community of self-hosters?
Does the project have sufficient support staff for billing disputes?

market_analysis.observation: Introduction of TradFi-ready architectural services and quantitative backgrounds into the community.
market_analysis.relevance: High availability of Senior AI Architects with quantitative TradFi experience indicates increasing institutional or professional interest in ElizaOS.
